verifiers.name: Password
verifiers.description: Traditional password-only login, no passkey support
verifiers.hint: Baseline flow - passkeys disabled

verifiers.name: Discoverable
verifiers.description: Passkey button triggers discoverable credential flow
verifiers.hint: Click 'Login with Passkey' - no username needed

verifiers.name: Discoverable (No UH)
verifiers.hint: User identified by credential ID only, userHandle ignored. Enables cross-account credential attacks.

verifiers.name: Non-Discoverable
verifiers.description: Username-first flow with passkey or password fallback
verifiers.hint: Enter username → server sends allowCredentials list → authenticate with passkey or password

verifiers.name: Conditional UI
verifiers.description: Passkeys appear in browser autofill suggestions
verifiers.hint: Focus username field to see passkey autofill (requires browser support)

verifiers.name: 2FA
verifiers.description: Password first, then passkey as second factor
verifiers.hint: Password → passkey prompt (if registered). UV=required.

verifiers.name: 2FA (No UV)
verifiers.hint: UV=discouraged, authenticator skips PIN/biometric

verifiers.name: Discoverable (No UV)
verifiers.description: Discoverable flow with user verification discouraged
verifiers.hint: UV=discouraged, authenticator skips PIN/biometric

verifiers.name: No Cred Binding
verifiers.description: Credential not verified against pre-identified user's allowCredentials
verifiers.hint: Enter victim's username, use your own credential → logged in as credential owner (yourself)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Libya
rewardFlag.description: This flag was once the only national flag of a single color (solid green from 1977-2011). The current flag revives the 1951 design with red, black, and green stripes and a white crescent and star.

verifiers.name: Cred Binding Takeover
verifiers.description: Server logs in as pre-identified user instead of credential owner
verifiers.hint: Enter victim's username, use your credential → logged in as victim (account takeover)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Cambodia
rewardFlag.description: Features Angkor Wat, one of only two national flags depicting a building (the other is Afghanistan). The temple represents integrity, justice, and heritage. A symbol of national pride!

verifiers.name: No User Handle
verifiers.description: userHandle not verified against credential owner
verifiers.hint: Send mismatched userHandle with your credential → logged in as credential owner

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Belize
rewardFlag.description: Features the most detailed coat of arms on any flag, including two humans (woodcutters) - one of the few flags with human figures. The motto reads 'Sub Umbra Floreo' (Under the Shade I Flourish).

verifiers.name: User Handle Takeover
verifiers.description: Server logs in as userHandle user instead of credential owner
verifiers.hint: Use your credential, set userHandle to victim's ID → logged in as victim (account takeover)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Paraguay
rewardFlag.description: The only national flag with different emblems on each side! The front shows the national coat of arms with a lion and liberty cap, the back shows the treasury seal with a lion guarding liberty.

verifiers.name: No Type Check
verifiers.hint: Set type to anything (not 'webauthn.get') → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Lesotho
rewardFlag.description: Features a traditional Basotho hat (mokorotlo) in black, representing peace. The blue represents rain, white represents peace, and green represents prosperity. Adopted in 2006.

verifiers.name: Type Swap
verifiers.description: Wrong ceremony type accepted for authentication
verifiers.hint: Set type='webauthn.create' instead of 'webauthn.get'

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Ecuador
rewardFlag.description: Features a condor atop the coat of arms representing power and defense. The snow-capped volcano Chimborazo and the river represent the country's natural beauty. One of the most detailed flags in the Americas!

verifiers.name: No Challenge
verifiers.hint: Set arbitrary/random challenge in clientDataJSON → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of San Marino
rewardFlag.description: One of the oldest republics in the world, founded in 301 AD! The three towers (Guaita, Cesta, and Montale) represent the three peaks of Monte Titano. Features a crown symbolizing national sovereignty.

verifiers.name: Reused Challenge
verifiers.hint: Replay already-used challenge from your session → accepted again

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Andorra
rewardFlag.description: Features a unique coat of arms reflecting dual sovereignty of France and Spain - the Bishop of Urgell's mitre and the French President's stripes. The motto reads 'Virtus Unita Fortior' (United Virtue is Stronger).

verifiers.name: Cross-Session Challenge
verifiers.hint: Use unused challenge from another session → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Moldova
rewardFlag.description: Features an eagle holding an Orthodox cross in its beak, a shield with an aurochs head (ancient wild ox), and an olive branch. The eagle holds a scepter and an olive branch representing peace.

verifiers.name: No Origin
verifiers.hint: Set origin to attacker domain → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Montenegro
rewardFlag.description: Features a double-headed eagle, one of few countries still using this Byzantine symbol. The eagle holds a scepter and orb, with a lion passant on its chest representing the historical connection to Venice.

verifiers.name: Same-Site Origin
verifiers.hint: Use subdomain/sibling domain origin → accepted (attacker.example.com → app.example.com)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Georgia
rewardFlag.description: The five-cross design dates back to medieval times, associated with the Bagrationi dynasty. The large central cross and four smaller crosses are known as the Jerusalem Cross or Bolnisi Cross.

verifiers.name: No Cross-Origin
verifiers.hint: Embed in attacker iframe → crossOrigin=true, topOrigin=attacker accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Armenia
rewardFlag.description: The oldest Christian nation's flag - red symbolizes the Armenian Highland and the blood shed for independence, blue represents the will to live under peaceful skies, and orange represents creative talent and hard work.

verifiers.name: No RP ID
verifiers.description: rpIdHash not verified against expected RP ID
verifiers.hint: Use assertion signed for different RP ID → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Azerbaijan
rewardFlag.description: The crescent and eight-pointed star represent Islam and the eight Turkic peoples. Blue represents the Turkic heritage, red represents progress and modernity, green represents Islam.

verifiers.name: Same-Site RP ID
verifiers.hint: Use rpIdHash of parent domain (example.com for app.example.com) → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Tajikistan
rewardFlag.description: The crown represents the Tajik people (Tajik means 'crown' in Persian). The seven stars represent perfection, happiness, and the seven noted skills and virtues in Tajik culture.

verifiers.name: No UP Flag
verifiers.hint: Set UP=0 in authenticatorData → accepted without user interaction proof

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Uzbekistan
rewardFlag.description: Twelve stars represent the months and the zodiac constellations from ancient Uzbek tradition. The crescent represents the rebirth of the nation as an independent country. Blue was Tamerlane's color.

verifiers.name: No UV Flag
verifiers.description: User Verified flag not checked despite UV=required
verifiers.hint: Set UV=0 in authenticatorData → accepted without biometric/PIN proof

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Kyrgyzstan
rewardFlag.description: The sun has 40 rays representing the 40 Kyrgyz tribes united by the legendary hero Manas. The center shows a tunduk - the crown of a yurt (traditional nomadic home), symbolizing family and the universe.

verifiers.name: No Backup Flags
verifiers.description: BE/BS backup flags consistency not verified
verifiers.hint: Set BE=0, BS=1 (invalid combo) → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of North Macedonia
rewardFlag.description: The eight-rayed Vergina Sun replaced the controversial Star of Vergina in 1995 after a dispute with Greece. The rays extend to the edges of the flag, creating a dynamic, radiating design.

verifiers.name: No BE Consistency
verifiers.description: BE flag not compared against stored backupEligible
verifiers.hint: Set BE flag different than registration value → inconsistency not detected

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Bosnia and Herzegovina
rewardFlag.description: The triangle represents the three main ethnic groups (Bosniaks, Croats, and Serbs). The stars represent Europe and are cut off to suggest infinity. Adopted in 1998 after international mediation.

verifiers.name: No Signature
verifiers.hint: Send invalid/modified signature → still accepted (critical vuln)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Micronesia
rewardFlag.description: Four white stars on a light blue background represent the four island groups: Yap, Chuuk, Pohnpei, and Kosrae. The blue represents the Pacific Ocean that surrounds the islands.

verifiers.name: No Counter
verifiers.description: Signature counter not verified for rollback
verifiers.hint: Replay assertion with lower counter → cloned authenticator not detected

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Nauru
rewardFlag.description: A unique design with a blue background, gold stripe at the equator, and a 12-pointed white star representing the 12 original tribes. The star's position shows Nauru's location just south of the equator.

verifiers.name: All Algorithms
verifiers.description: Supports all common algorithms (ES*, PS*, RS*, EdDSA)
verifiers.hint: Authenticator picks best supported algorithm from list

verifiers.name: ES256
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -7. Default for most authenticators.

verifiers.name: ES384
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -35. Higher security than ES256.

verifiers.name: ES512
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -36. Highest EC security level.

verifiers.name: PS256
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -37. RSA probabilistic signature.

verifiers.name: PS384
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -38. Stronger RSA-PSS variant.

verifiers.name: PS512
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -39. Strongest RSA-PSS variant.

verifiers.name: RS256
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -257. Legacy RSA signature.

verifiers.name: RS384
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -258. Legacy RSA variant.

verifiers.name: RS512
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -259. Strongest legacy RSA.

verifiers.name: EdDSA
verifiers.hint: COSE alg -8. Modern, efficient curve.

verifiers.name: RP ID Upscope
verifiers.hint: app.example.com → rpId=example.com. Allows cross-subdomain credential use.

verifiers.name: Platform
verifiers.description: Request platform authenticator (Touch ID, Windows Hello)
verifiers.hint: authenticatorAttachment='platform'. Browser shows only built-in options.

verifiers.name: Cross-Platform
verifiers.hint: authenticatorAttachment='cross-platform'. Use YubiKey or cross-device flow.

verifiers.name: Attestation
verifiers.hint: attestation='direct'. Server receives authenticator make/model info (not enforced).

verifiers.name: No Type Check
verifiers.hint: Set type to anything (not 'webauthn.create') → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Uganda
rewardFlag.description: Features a grey crowned crane, the national bird, in the center. The crane was chosen because it was the military badge of Ugandan soldiers during British rule and is known for its gentle nature.

verifiers.name: Type Swap
verifiers.description: Wrong ceremony type accepted for registration
verifiers.hint: Set type='webauthn.get' instead of 'webauthn.create'

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Zimbabwe
rewardFlag.description: Features a Zimbabwe Bird, an ancient soapstone sculpture found at Great Zimbabwe ruins. The red star represents the nation's hopes for the future and socialism.

verifiers.name: No Challenge
verifiers.hint: Set arbitrary/random challenge in clientDataJSON → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Guatemala
rewardFlag.description: The quetzal bird on the coat of arms symbolizes liberty - it's said to die in captivity. The crossed rifles and swords represent Guatemala's willingness to defend itself.

verifiers.name: Reused Challenge
verifiers.hint: Replay already-used challenge from your session → accepted again

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Bolivia
rewardFlag.description: One of the few countries with two official flags! The civil flag has horizontal stripes, while the state flag includes the coat of arms with a condor and alpaca.

verifiers.name: Cross-Session Challenge
verifiers.hint: Use unused challenge from another session → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of El Salvador
rewardFlag.description: The coat of arms features a triangle representing equality, five volcanoes for the Central American nations, and a rainbow symbolizing peace. The motto reads 'God, Union, Liberty'.

verifiers.name: No Origin
verifiers.hint: Set origin to attacker domain → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Honduras
rewardFlag.description: The five stars represent the five nations of the former Federal Republic of Central America. The blue stripes symbolize the Pacific Ocean and Caribbean Sea.

verifiers.name: Same-Site Origin
verifiers.hint: Use subdomain/sibling domain origin → accepted (attacker.example.com → app.example.com)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Nicaragua
rewardFlag.description: The triangle represents equality, the rainbow represents peace, and the five volcanoes represent the original five member states of the Federal Republic of Central America.

verifiers.name: No Cross-Origin
verifiers.hint: Embed in attacker iframe → crossOrigin=true, topOrigin=attacker accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Costa Rica
rewardFlag.description: The civil flag is one of the few without a coat of arms that still uses five stripes. The red represents the blood shed for freedom and the generosity of the people.

verifiers.name: No RP ID
verifiers.description: rpIdHash not verified against expected RP ID
verifiers.hint: Use credential signed for different RP ID → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Panama
rewardFlag.description: Designed by the first president's son! The blue represents the Conservative Party, red the Liberal Party, and white the peace between them. The stars represent civic virtues.

verifiers.name: Same-Site RP ID
verifiers.hint: Use rpIdHash of parent domain (example.com for app.example.com) → accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Dominican Republic
rewardFlag.description: The only national flag with a Bible depicted on it! The Bible is open to John 8:32: 'The truth shall set you free'. Features a unique white cross dividing the colors.

verifiers.name: No UP Flag
verifiers.hint: Set UP=0 in authenticatorData → accepted without user interaction proof

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Haiti
rewardFlag.description: The coat of arms shows a palm tree (liberty), weapons ready to defend freedom, and the motto 'L'Union Fait La Force' (Unity Makes Strength). Based on the French tricolor.

verifiers.name: No UV Flag
verifiers.description: User Verified flag not checked despite UV=required
verifiers.hint: Set UV=0 in authenticatorData → accepted without biometric/PIN proof

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Barbados
rewardFlag.description: Features the head of a trident (from the mythical sea god's staff), symbolizing the break from colonial rule. The broken shaft represents the break with the past.

verifiers.name: No Backup Flags
verifiers.description: BE/BS backup flags consistency not verified
verifiers.hint: Set BE=0, BS=1 (invalid combo) → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Trinidad and Tobago
rewardFlag.description: The black diagonal band represents the earth's richness and dedication of the people. Red represents the vitality of the land and people, white represents the sea.

verifiers.name: No Algorithm Check
verifiers.description: Credential algorithm not verified against pubKeyCredParams
verifiers.hint: Register with PS384 (excluded from list) → still accepted

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Bahamas
rewardFlag.description: The black triangle represents the unity and determination of the Bahamian people. The aquamarine stripes represent the surrounding waters, and gold represents the sand.

verifiers.name: No Cred ID Length
verifiers.description: Credential ID length not verified (max 1023 bytes)
verifiers.hint: Register with credential ID >1023 bytes → still accepted (DoS potential)

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Guyana
rewardFlag.description: Known as 'The Golden Arrowhead'. The arrow shape represents moving forward into the future. Green represents agriculture, white the rivers, gold the mineral wealth, red the zeal of nation-building.

verifiers.name: Duplicate Cred ID
verifiers.description: Duplicate credential IDs allowed → Account Lockout
verifiers.hint: Register with victim's credential ID → your key stored. Victim authenticates → finds your key (last match) → signature fails → lockout.

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Suriname
rewardFlag.description: The yellow star represents unity and a golden future. Green symbolizes the fertile land, white represents justice and freedom, red represents progress and love.

verifiers.name: Cred Overwrite
verifiers.description: Credentials overwritten with new keys → Account Takeover
verifiers.hint: Register with victim's credential ID → your key replaces theirs. Authenticate with victim's cred ID + your key → logged in as victim.

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Tuvalu
rewardFlag.description: Features the Union Jack and nine stars representing the nine islands of Tuvalu. The light blue background represents the Pacific Ocean surrounding the islands.

verifiers.name: Cross-Account Cred
verifiers.description: Credentials stored under different user → Account Forgery
verifiers.hint: Register with victim's user.id + pubkey → victim's credential stored in your account. Use 'Discoverable (No UH)' → victim logs into your account.

rewardFlag.title: Flag of Palau
rewardFlag.description: Features a golden yellow full moon slightly off-center on a light blue background. The moon represents peace and tranquility, while the blue represents the transition from foreign domination to self-government.
